source_snippet:
Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes
Draft
April 29, 2026
Abstract
For fixed h, let N(h,k) be the least N such that every cardinality |hA| attained by a
k-element set of integers is also attained by a k-element subset of {1,...,N}. We prove,
using Rajagopal’s fixed-h theorem on the range of possible values of |hA|, that
N(h,k)≤kCh
for every fixed h. The new ingredient is a polynomial-diameter replacement for the sparse
geometric blocks in Rajagopal’s large-value construction. The replacement is carried out
at the level of the low-degree Hilbert functions, which are the only data relevant to h-fold
sumsets when h is fixed.
title: 步骤_step1 (定义极值函数 $N(h,k)$...)
description: 定义极值函数 $N(h,k)$，刻画使得任意 $k$ 元整数集的 $h$ 重和集基数均可在初始区间 $\{1,\dots,N\}$ 中复现的最小上界。 [核心键点: 明确 $N(h,k)$ 的组合极值定义及其与 $h$ 重和集基数 $|hA|$ 的映射约束。; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: def N (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := sorry

Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes

April 29, 2026

for every fixed h. The new ingredient is a polynomial-diameter replacement for the sparse
geometric blocks in Rajagopal’s large-value construction. The replacement is carried out

title: 步骤_step2 (基于 Rajagopal 的固...)
description: 基于 Rajagopal 的固定 $h$ 定理，建立 $N(h,k)$ 关于 $k$ 的多项式上界估计。 [核心键点: 利用已知定理推导核心不等式 $N(h,k) \le k^{C_h}$，确立多项式压缩性质。; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: theorem main_bound (h : ℕ) : ∃ C_h : ℕ, ∀ k : ℕ, N h k ≤ k ^ C_h := by sorry

source_snippet:
Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes
Draft
April 29, 2026
Abstract
For fixed h, let N(h,k) be the least N such that every cardinality |hA| attained by a
k-element set of integers is also attained by a k-element subset of {1,...,N}. We prove,
using Rajagopal’s fixed-h theorem on the range of possible values of |hA|, that
N(h,k)≤kCh
for every fixed h. The new ingredient is a polynomial-diameter replacement for the sparse
geometric blocks in Rajagopal’s large-value construction. The replacement is carried out
at the level of the low-degree Hilbert functions, which are the only data relevant to h-fold

title: 步骤_step3 (引入低次 Hilbert 函数...)
description: 引入低次 Hilbert 函数层面的多项式直径替换技术，以替代原构造中的稀疏几何块。 [核心键点: 阐明新构造的核心机制，并论证在固定 $h$ 情形下 Hilbert 函数对和集数据的完备刻画。; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: theorem hilbert_replacement_validity (h : ℕ) : ∀ A : Finset ℤ, A.card = k → ∃ B : Finset ℕ, B.card = k ∧ B ⊆ Finset.Icc 1 (N h k) ∧ (h • A).card = (h • B).card := by sorry

source_snippet:
1 Introduction
For a finite set A ⊂ Z and a positive integer h, write
hA = {a +···+a : a ∈ A}
1 h i
with repetitions allowed. Define
R(h,k) = {|hA| : A ⊂ Z, |A| = k}.
Let N(h,k) be the least positive integer N such that
R(h,k) = {|hA| : A ⊆ {1,...,N}, |A| = k}.
Equivalently, one may work in intervals [0,N −1] and translate at the end.
The purpose of this note is to prove the following polynomial compression bound.
title: 步骤_step1 (定义集合 $A$ 的 $h$ ...)
description: 定义集合 $A$ 的 $h$ 重和集 $hA$，允许元素重复选取。 [核心键点: hA 的集合构造与基数定义; 来源: p1_s22 页1]
lean_code: def h_fold_sumset (A : Finset ℤ) (h : ℕ) : Finset ℤ := sorry
